info.title: Diceware:
info.description: Application that randomly draws words folling the Diceware(TM) rules.

options.name: --word-count
options.description: The number of words that compose the passphrase.

options.name: --extra-security
options.description: Adds an extra symbol in the passphrase.

options.name: --download-url
options.description: An URL where to download the words list.

options.name: --force-download
options.description: Force download of the words list even if cache exists. This overwrites the currently cached file if exists.
